title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's Claude Code Harness is a solopreneur framework with 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session locking for client isolation. The harness improves context engineering, token efficiency, and separation of concerns compared to raw Claude Code usage. It has been applied to build practical applications including a Spanish-learning music player, native macOS transcription tool, and Hermit Host self-hosted deployment platform.
